# EV Overseas

> Unbiased, transparent study abroad consulting based in Hyderabad, India.

EV Overseas is an overseas education consultancy providing honest, data-driven career roadmap and student visa processing services with zero hidden agency fees or commissions.

## Core Facts

- **Office Address:** 302A Aaltos A&M Trade Center, Himayat Nagar, Hyderabad, Telangana 500029, India.
- **Official Telephone:** +91-9666963756
- **Official Email:** info@evoverseas.com
- **Visa Success Rate:** 97% consulate success rate for USA F-1 student visas, UK Student Route, Germany Study Visas, and Australia Student Visas (Subclass 500).
- **Pricing:** ₹0 for initial admissions counselling, profile matching, and university shortlist. Transparency-first pricing with no under-the-table commissions.

## Core Navigation

- [Home](https://evoverseas.com/) - Main page with the Profile Matcher, Cost Calculator, and Scholarship filters.
- [Study in USA](https://evoverseas.com/study-in-usa.html) - Complete F-1 student visa and university admission guide.
- [Study in UK](https://evoverseas.com/study-in-uk.html) - CAS letter, unconditional offers, and Student Route visa guide.
- [Study in Germany](https://evoverseas.com/study-in-germany.html) - Public university free tuition guide, APS certificate, and Blocked Account setup.
- [Study in Australia](https://evoverseas.com/study-in-australia.html) - GS (Genuine Student) evaluation, CoE issuance, and Subclass 500 visa.
- [Contact Us](https://evoverseas.com/contact.html) - Forms, maps, and appointment booking for office walk-ins or Google Meet slots.
- [Dashboard](https://evoverseas.com/dashboard.html) - Live credentials and application status portal for registered students.

## Full Details
- For comprehensive data, details, deadlines, and cost breakdowns, see the [Full Specification Guide](https://evoverseas.com/llms-full.txt).
